chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 250 of 2010 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. ----------------- 31.01.2023. None present for the Applicant. --------------- None present nor any intimation received. Matter is coming up for non-prosecution; whereas, Counsel earlier representing the Applicant has returned all briefs and thereafter no effort has been made by the Applicant to engage another Counsel. Matter is fixed for non-prosecution after 2017. It appears that the Applicant has lost interest in proceeding with this Reference Application, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
